name: Rice
description: Staple cereal grown in flooded paddies; main carbohydrate crop across South Asia.
water_requirement: High — needs standing water through most of the growth cycle

name: Wheat
description: Cool-season cereal grown for grain and flour.
water_requirement: Medium — 4 to 6 irrigations across the season

name: Maize
description: Versatile cereal used for food, feed and starch.
water_requirement: Medium — sensitive to water stress at tasselling

name: Potato
description: Tuber crop grown in cool weather for its starchy roots.
water_requirement: Medium — keep soil evenly moist, avoid waterlogging

name: Tomato
description: Warm-season fruiting vegetable rich in vitamins.
water_requirement: Medium — regular watering, more at flowering and fruiting

name: Cabbage
description: Cool-season leafy vegetable forming a compact head.
water_requirement: Medium — frequent light irrigation for steady head growth

name: Carrot
description: Cool-season root vegetable grown for its sweet taproot.
water_requirement: Medium — even moisture prevents cracked or forked roots

name: Beans
description: Legume that fixes nitrogen and yields protein-rich pods.
water_requirement: Low to medium — avoid waterlogging which causes root rot

name: Cassava
description: Drought-tolerant tropical tuber and major calorie source.
water_requirement: Low — very drought tolerant once established

name: Banana
description: Perennial tropical fruit grown from suckers.
water_requirement: High — needs steady moisture, very sensitive to drought
